productDisplayName: ADIDAS Kids Boys Solid Navy Blue Jackets
description: Composition Navy blue hooded filled jacket made of 100% polyester, has a mock neck with a zipper, long sleeves with adidas patented 3-Stripes along the shoulder and sleeves, pockets on the sides of the waist with tape detailing, piping on the hood, and a heat transfered logo on the left chest Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash below 40 degrees separately Do not dry clean Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decoartions Perfect for your kid's winter needs, this filled jacket from adidas is designed to offer exemplary warmth. Layer it over tees or tops, team it with adidas sports shoes and a cap for a sporty look.
